title: eriosema scioanum subsp. scioanum
intro: Eriosema scioanum subsp. scioanum, also known as the climbing pea or pea flower, is a perennial plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant's health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, prevent infections, and promote wound healing. Eriosema scioanum subsp. scioanum can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for oral consumption, or as a topical paste for skin applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
